# comfyui_open_ai_input_files (Resource)

Loads and prepares input files (text, pdf, etc.) to include as inputs for the OpenAI Chat Node. The files will be read by the OpenAI model when generating a response. 🛈 TIP: Can be chained together with other OpenAI Input File nodes. [api node/text/OpenAI]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file` (String) Input: COMBO

### Optional

- `openai_input_files` (String) Input: OPENAI_INPUT_FILES (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `openai_input_files_output` (String) Output: OPENAI_INPUT_FILES (slot 0)
